mechanics.name_guess: Block (Defense): Your opponent" damage is divided in
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 103 > npcs > Block (Defense): Your opponent" damage is divided in
mechanics.excerpt: Block (Defense): Your opponent" damage is divided in half (round down) but you cannot inflict damage this round. Precision Hit (Attack): character must have +2 Skili Bonus or better in Karate to use this maneuver. When making an aimed shot at specific location, the target number receives 3 Modifier.
